findings.title: Live scoring UI missing PPTX Level 1 dropdowns
findings.suggestion: Wire ball length / ball line / bowler type / shot type into the ball-entry form.

findings.title: Analytics view missing
findings.suggestion: PPTX § Scorecard & Analytics view — dismissal patterns + pitch map.

findings.title: Scoring backend lacks structured logging
findings.suggestion: Add pino-http (matches main backend) so Cloud Logging can parse fields.

findings.title: Scoring backend has no rate limiting
Undo last ball not exposed in scoring UI
findings.suggestion: Add an undo button (PPTX § Team — Edit score / Undo last ball).

findings.title: No graceful shutdown handler
findings.suggestion: Listen for SIGTERM and close the HTTP server + DB pool to drain in-flight requests cleanly.

findings.title: CI does not exercise the scoring subproject
findings.suggestion: Add a job that runs `cd scoring && npm ci && npm run build` so PRs catch scoring regressions.

findings.title: Two prisma schemas in the same repo
findings.suggestion: Document the boundary (which schema owns which models) or merge — duplicate User models risk drift.

findings.title: ARCHITECTURE.md has no diagrams
findings.suggestion: Add at least one Mermaid C4 / context diagram so new engineers can orient.

findings.title: npm audit failed for backend
findings.suggestion: Run npm install first, then re-run audit.

findings.title: npm audit failed for frontend
findings.suggestion: Run npm install first, then re-run audit.

findings.title: No Storybook / component catalogue
findings.suggestion: Consider Storybook so the design system is discoverable. Optional for v1.
